intro: A selection of products and experiments spanning full-stack systems, applied AI, cloud infrastructure, and mobile development.

projects.title: ThirdEyeAI – Real-time Engagement Detection & Meeting Platform
projects.imageAlt: ThirdEyeAI meeting and engagement analytics interface
projects.summary: An AI-powered learning platform combining a WebRTC meeting engine, privacy-first engagement detection, instructor analytics, and natural-language session insights.
highlights: Engineered a hybrid ensemble bagging model using a 1D CNN and 1D ResNet trained on the DAiSEE dataset.
Moved engagement inference into the browser with TensorFlow.js, keeping video processing on the client and allowing inference capacity to scale with participants.
Built a WebRTC meeting engine with real-time engagement visualization for instructors.
Integrated a retrieval-augmented generation workflow for querying participation and distraction data in natural language.

projects.title: CertiSafe – Certificate Management System
projects.summary: A deployed certificate-management platform for an institute, designed to organize certificate records and securely manage associated media.
highlights: Led a four-member team through implementation and deployment.
Used DynamoDB for application data and Cloudinary for certificate media handling.
Delivered a working institutional platform rather than a standalone prototype.

projects.title: IPL Score Predictor AI
projects.summary: A deep neural network built with Keras to estimate the final score of an ongoing IPL innings from live match context.
highlights: Models current runs, wickets, overs, recent performance, and team information.
Turns changing match conditions into a practical final-score estimate.

projects.title: ResumeByAI
projects.summary: A Next.js application that uses GPT-4 Turbo to generate ATS-oriented résumés and integrates Razorpay for paid access.
highlights: Combines guided résumé generation with a payment workflow.
Focuses generated output on applicant-tracking-system readability.

projects.title: MindPlan
projects.summary: A Flutter productivity application for managing goals, prioritizing work with the Eisenhower Matrix, and reviewing daily productivity.
highlights: Connects long-term goals with daily task planning.
Uses the Eisenhower Matrix to make prioritization explicit.
